caption: A person wearing a black t-shirt is seated at a desk in a room with grey walls, appearing in a video stream overlay. To the left of the person, a digital spreadsheet lists NBA teams and corresponding names, such as "BROOKLYN NETS" and "CHARLOTTE HORNETS." On the right, a chat window displays messages from "glowbog27" and "Nightbot," including the text "Click the link for the BREAK SCHEDULE, SHIPPING INFO and MORE! >>> https://bit.ly/2SswK4y". A "JASY'S CASEBREAKS.COM" logo is visible at the bottom of the stream. As the sequence progresses, a hand enters the frame from the right, holding a cardboard box containing various items, which is gradually moved toward the center of the screen, partially obscuring the spreadsheet and the person. The scene shifts from a static view of the streamer and their screen to the introduction of physical products being presented to the camera.
